steps.name: implementation
steps.acceptance: per_dim_scale added to model.py and train.py; all unit tests pass (forward-inverse consistency, log-det correctness, backward compat, Jacobian triangularity)

steps.name: phase1_validation
steps.acceptance: Single-molecule ethanol (T=9, no padding) achieves VF >= 90% with per_dim_scale=True

steps.name: phase2_padding
steps.acceptance: Ethanol at T=9 and T=21 both >= 85%, |VF(T=9) - VF(T=21)| < 10pp

steps.name: phase3_sanity
steps.acceptance: Multi-molecule (all 8, T=21) VF > 50% on ethanol AND mean VF > 40%

steps.name: phase3_heuristics
steps.acceptance: VF >= 50% on >= 4/8 molecules after sweep + full run

steps.name: phase3_scale
steps.acceptance: VF >= 50% on >= 4/8 molecules with larger model

steps.name: final_report
steps.acceptance: Final report written to reports/final_report.md with all results

steps.name: source_integration
steps.acceptance: No .py files in experiment dir; src/ reflects current practice

steps.name: merge_and_tag
steps.acceptance: Merged to main with tag hyp_008; pre-merge checks pass
